ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – 7:00 PM – 8:00 PM EST
ham.body:
Hello Team,

We will be performing scheduled maintenance on the corporate VPN during the following window:

Date: 2026-04-15
Time: 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM EST

During this period the VPN will be inaccessible. Please plan accordingly and ensure you have offline access to essential resources. If you encounter any issues after the maintenance, contact IT Support at support@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Gift Card Verification for CFO
spam.body:
Dear [Name],

This is an urgent message from the CEO, John Doe. Due to a recent audit, the CFO has requested immediate verification of a $500 gift card purchase that was made on your expense account. Please confirm the purchase details by
